register.note: Full-width before/after diptych, poster-worthy and thumbnail-legible; the bare left 'no opinion' scatter is quieter than the right gradient, holding it at 3.
Trained panel draws the probability gradient AND the dashed boundary plus red-ring residuals — mechanism, not just data.
In-graphic header, axis labels and the classifier's-verdict accuracy/log-loss/class-hue strip carry meaning; the P=0.5 boundary line is untagged.
Warm paper, soft gradient, AA prose, quiet chrome read Distill-soft; mild dead air below the see prose column.
Train, scrub-descent, probability-field toggle, raw+x1^2 toggle and act stepper are explanatory controls clearing the floor.
amber=truth, blue=prediction, red=error reserved to point rings (no all-red field); matches r2d3's disciplined palette.

hero.note: Before/after diptych untrained(50%, flat field) vs trained(93%, gold/blue boundary); to reach 4, a flat 50% wash on the left and a P=0.5 tag.

assessment.note: Explain closes on an open free-text transfer (commit/reveal); right panel has a live raw+x1^2 toggle.

verdict.summary: New before/after hero depicts the mechanism and clears floor 3 on both gated dimensions; every register dimension a solid 3.
